entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes used as a cost-effective alternative for animal protein to improve diets in South-East Asia and Africa

entities.name: ANIMAL PROTEIN
entities.description: Nutritional component that grain legumes can replace in diets

entities.name: SOUTH-EAST ASIA
entities.description: Region where grain legumes are used to improve diets of the poor

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where grain legumes are used to improve diets of the poor

entities.name: SYMBIOTIC NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: Biological process used by legumes to meet their nitrogen demand and enrich the soil

entities.name: NITROGEN DEMAND
entities.description: The requirement for nitrogen in grain legumes

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The medium enriched by legumes through symbiotic nitrogen fixation

entities.name: PULSE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The cultivation and production of pulses

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that cause yield losses in grain legumes

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Living environmental factors that cause yield losses in grain legumes

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in crop output resulting from abiotic and biotic stresses

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding approaches used to improve legume yields

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Genetic breeding approaches used to improve legume yields

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used for crop protection, noted for increasing costs and negative effects

entities.name: FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical agents used for crop production, noted for increasing costs and negative effects

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL OPTIONS
entities.description: Eco-friendly alternatives to pesticides and fertilizers for crop production and protection

entities.name: PGP BACTERIA
entities.description: Plant growth-promoting bacteria used to improve soil and plant health

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The biological and chemical quality of the soil improved by PGP bacteria

entities.name: PLANT HEALTH
entities.description: The physiological state of the plant improved by PGP bacteria

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Eco-friendly farming systems with low production costs and minimal resource consumption

entities.name: PGP ACTINOBACTERIA
entities.description: Specific plant growth-promoting actinobacteria used to enhance yield and control pests and pathogens

entities.name: METABOLITES
entities.description: Chemical substances produced by PGP actinobacteria used for yield enhancement and pest control

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that damage grain legumes and are controlled by PGP actinobacteria

entities.name: PATHOGENS
entities.description: Disease-causing organisms that affect grain legumes and are controlled by PGP actinobacteria
